subcodes.first_line: Hearken unto the Call from the Valley of faithfulness in the luminous Spot: "Verily, there is no God but Him, the Mighty One." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان استمع الندآء من الواد الایمن فی البقعه النورا انه لا اله الا هو العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
